assertion_results.text: Step 0 detects the absence of the Deployment Context column in the Source Repositories table and defaults all repositories to upstream (§1.78)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md states: 'The Source Repositories table does NOT have a Deployment Context column. Per the backward compatibility rule (SKILL.md Step 0), all repositories default to upstream.' and 'Parsed mapping: rhtpa-backend -> { url: "https://github.com/rhtpa/rhtpa-backend", deployment_context: "upstream" } (default)'

assertion_results.text: Remediation task descriptions do NOT include a Coordination Guidance subsection -- the section is omitted entirely when no Deployment Context column exists
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md explicitly states for both tasks: 'No Coordination Guidance subsection is included because the Source Repositories table does not have a Deployment Context column. This preserves backward compatibility.' The task descriptions under Implementation Notes contain no '### Coordination Guidance' subsection.

assertion_results.text: The triage proceeds normally through all steps without errors from the missing Deployment Context column
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md states: 'The triage proceeded through all steps (0, 0.3, 0.7, 1, 1.5, 1.7, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8) without errors from the missing Deployment Context column. Backward compatibility is fully maintained.' The data-extraction.md shows normal Step 0 and Step 1 execution without errors.

assertion_results.text: Backward compatibility is maintained -- existing eval behavior is unaffected by the absence of the Deployment Context column
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md notes for Task 1: 'No Coordination Guidance subsection is included because the Source Repositories table does not have a Deployment Context column. This preserves backward compatibility -- existing eval behavior is unaffected.' The remediation tasks follow the standard template format without any deployment-context-specific content.
